_comment: Generic KPI registry. The setup-hierarchy-and-kpis.sample.mjs script reads this and inserts/updates rows in company_kpis. Each entry: kpiId, label, direction, targetMicros (or null), windowDays, ownerRole, description.

_format.targetMicros: the target value × 1_000_000 (so 25.0 = 25_000_000); null = no fixed target
_format.ownerRole: must match an existing agent role (e.g. ceo, cmo, cro, cdo_telemetry)

kpis.label: Qualified leads (7d)
kpis.description: Rolling 7-day count of leads matching the qualification criteria.

kpis.label: Average order value (30d)
kpis.description: Mean USD per confirmed order, rolling 30d.

kpis.label: UTM attribution coverage %
kpis.description: Pct of marketing events with non-null utm_source. Bottleneck KPI: blocks reliable measurement of all marketing KPIs.

kpis.label: KPI freshness (seconds)
kpis.description: Max staleness across all snapshots. Lower is better. Wildcard bottleneck — blocks every KPI when stale.

kpis.label: Agent error rate %
kpis.description: Failed runs ÷ total runs in last 24h. Owned by Chief of Staff (system tier).
